text: Very courteous professional and prompt service.

translations.sr: Veoma ljubazna, profesionalna i brza usluga.
translations.sr_cyrl: Веома љубазна, професионална и брза услуга.
translations.en: Very courteous professional and prompt service.
translations.ru: Очень вежливое, профессиональное и оперативное обслуживание.
translations.de: Sehr höflicher, professioneller und prompter Service.
translations.tr: Çok nazik, profesyonel ve hızlı hizmet.
